title: What happened with The Outlast Trials
excerpt: Outlast Trials forgot what made the series scary. Co-op stripped out the vulnerability and dread that made the originals work.

title: Why Payday 3 Failed
excerpt: A masterpiece sold for parts. A rushed launch, shallow stealth, and always-online mandates sank a sequel that should have been a hit.

title: Pokémon and the Cost of Going Bigger
excerpt: Great core ideas. Wasted execution. Modern Pokémon games have bigger budgets and worse design.
